title: AI-Powered Demand Gen: How to Escape Manual Marketing and Scale Smarter
speaker: Eric Bridger, Marketing Director at Wealthbox
description: Discover how AI is revolutionizing demand generation and learn practical strategies to automate manual marketing tasks while driving better results at scale.
key_takeaways: How to identify which manual marketing tasks AI can automate first
3 AI tools that can immediately boost your demand gen efficiency
Framework for measuring ROI when implementing AI in your marketing stack
target_pain_point: Marketers are overwhelmed with manual, repetitive tasks that prevent them from focusing on strategy and growth
cta_customers: Ready to supercharge your marketing with AI? Join our exclusive post-webinar Q&A session for Wealthbox clients.
cta_prospects: Want to see how Wealthbox can help automate your demand gen? Book a personalized demo to explore AI-powered solutions for your team.
